surfaces.chat_bubble: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm border border-white/5

global.container: w-full max-w-[430px] mx-auto h-[100dvh] flex flex-col bg-[#0A0A0A] overflow-hidden relative

speaker_grid.structure: grid grid-cols-3 gap-y-6 gap-x-4 px-6 py-4
speaker_grid.avatar_container: relative w-16 h-16 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center

components.name: RoomHeader
components.classes: w-full flex items-center justify-between p-4 sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
elements: Back button (ArrowRight icon in RTL) on the right
Center container: Room Name (Cairo) + Live listeners count indicator

components.name: TabNavigation
components.description: Segmented control for toggling between Microphones and Live chat.
components.classes: flex p-1 mx-6 mt-4 bg-white/5 rounded-full border border-white/10 relative

components.name: SpeakerSeat

states.empty: w-16 h-16 rounded-full border-2 border-dashed border-white/20 bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center text-white/40 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors
states.speaking: occupied state + ring-2 ring-[#CCFF00] ring-offset-4 ring-offset-[#0A0A0A]

components.mic_badge: absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-5 h-5 bg-[#141414] rounded-full border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-[10px]

components.name: ChatArea
components.description: Scrollable chat section with top fade mask.
components.classes: flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-2 space-y-4 [mask-image:linear-gradient(to_bottom,transparent,black_10%,black)] scrollbar-hide

components.name: BottomActionBar
components.description: Floating controls at the bottom of the screen.
components.classes: absolute bottom-6 left-4 right-4 bg-[#1A1A1A]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 p-2 rounded-full flex items-center justify-between shadow-2xl
components.primary_action: flex-1 bg-[#CCFF00] text-black font-bold h-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2

framer_motion_hints.seat_enter: initial={{ scale: 0.8, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }}

image_urls.description: Young man wearing white soccer jersey

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The entire application must be set to dir='rtl' either on the body or the main wrapper.
CRITICAL: Use logical Tailwind CSS properties for RTL (e.g., ms-, me-, ps-, pe-, border-s-, border-e-, rounded-s-, rounded-e- instead of ml, mr, pl, pr, border-l, border-r).
CRITICAL: Add @import for Almarai and Cairo fonts in the global CSS file and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
The layout must simulate a mobile screen. Fix the width to max-w-[430px] and center it horizontally with a dark background for desktop viewing.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for the Header or Bottom Action bar; use the specified glassmorphism classes to avoid text collisions with scrolling content.
Use Phosphor icons (e.g., @phosphor-icons/react) with duotone or bold weights to match the sporty feel.
Implement the speaker grid using CSS Grid (grid-cols-3) to fit 12 seats evenly.
The primary CTA 'Join Stage' (الصعود للمسرح) must use the #CCFF00 lime color with black text for high contrast.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in CSS. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
